# Payxem

> Simple invoicing and payment platform for freelancers

Payxem is an online invoicing and payment tracking platform built for freelancers, consultants, and small businesses - especially in Pakistan, Bangladesh, and other underserved markets.

Payxem helps freelancers send invoices, share payment links, and accept payments via PayPal, Stripe, and cryptocurrency. Payment processing is handled by these third-party providers. Payxem enables freelancers to use PayPal and Stripe for international payments without expensive monthly subscriptions.

Payxem does not operate as a bank or payment processor. It does not hold or custody funds. It acts as a coordination and tracking layer for financial activity. Funds are released within 7 business/working days after security clearance.

## Core Features

- Professional invoice creation with line items, tax, and due dates
- Payment links and QR codes for quick payments
- Ledger-based wallet tracking with real-time balance
- Multi-currency support (52+ currencies with live exchange rates)
- Multiple payment methods (PayPal, credit/debit cards, cryptocurrency)
- XEM reward points program
- Identity verification (KYC) for payout eligibility
- Biometric login and PIN lock security

## Target Users

- Freelancers in Pakistan, Bangladesh, and South Asia (designers, developers, writers, marketers)
- Remote workers and consultants who need to receive international payments
- Small businesses and service providers needing PayPal & Stripe payment solutions
- Digital professionals in underserved markets where global payment platforms are restricted

## Regional Focus

Payxem is designed as an online payment solution for Pakistan and similar regions where PayPal is banned, restricted, or unavailable. Freelancers in Pakistan can use Payxem to invoice international clients, accept credit card and crypto payments, and withdraw to local bank accounts via IBAN or Wise. It also serves freelancers in Bangladesh, India, and other South Asian markets where access to Stripe and PayPal is limited.

## Pricing

- No monthly fees or setup costs
- Platform fee: 2.9% + $0.30 per payment received. Payment processors (PayPal, Stripe) apply their own fees based on their policy
- Clients can choose to cover the processing fee at checkout
- Free withdrawals from Payxem — Payxem does not charge any fee on withdrawals. Standard currency exchange or bank transfer fees may apply by partner or processing banks

## Keywords
